name: narrativeos-cognitive
description: NarrativeOS multi-agent reasoning mesh — narrative intelligence, sentiment analysis, adversarial debate, and confidence-weighted trading signals

skills.name: Financial Narrative Analysis

SEC 8-K filings for multiple tickers -> Topic clusters with momentum scores
